title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, push models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; simple API to chat, generate, embed, and manage models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, RAG).

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation example using Ollama and sentence-transformers.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, featuring syntax highlighting & history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat interface.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for building and running Ollama on NixOS with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU nodes and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app exposing Ollama models via REST with admin UI and async task queues.

title: ollama-node
summary: Lightweight Node.js wrapper around Ollama’s REST API with TypeScript definitions.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that uses Ollama for local LLM conversations with session memory.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API with serde models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, completion, and embeddings with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama ecosystem discussions, model benchmarks, and troubleshooting.

title: ollama-hnsw
summary: Fast vector search plugin for Ollama using hnswlib to enable RAG without external services.

title: ollama-benchmark
summary: Community-driven benchmark suite measuring prompt throughput and latency across Ollama models.
